title: Orientation Room
summary: The Gradient in plain language — constitutional claim, living practice, and what the institution refuses to become.

title: System Map Room
summary: Institutional anatomy — organs, lifecycle, cards, claims, relationships, and memory ecology.

title: Engines Room

summary: Applied institutional proof — ISA cases, Shape Change, Stewardship Exercise 001, and admitted world studies.

title: Platform Room
